list.title: Pandemic Exercise Simulator
list.description: Scenario modeling tool for pandemic planning developed at TACC. Presented as a tutorial at the epiENGAGE All Site Meeting at UT Austin (2026).

list.title: COVID-19 Burden & Vaccination Dashboard – Austin, TX
list.description: Interactive dashboard tracking COVID-19 spatial burden and vaccination rates across Austin, TX. Developed with the UT Austin COVID-19 Modeling Consortium.

list.title: Mapping COVID-19 Data with R
list.description: Tutorial on geospatial visualization of COVID-19 data in R. Presented at Data & Donuts at UT Austin (2020).

list.title: National Student Data Corps – Data Science Panel
list.description: Panelist for the January 2023 Data Science Panel Series hosted by the National Student Data Corps.

list.title: R Tutorial: Analyzing COVID-19 Vaccine Data
list.description: Educational tutorial on plotting and analyzing COVID-19 vaccine data in R. Presented for Laredo College LEAPS (2021).
